  max_num = nums.max || 1
  if max_num < 2
    return nums.size - 1

    if spf[i] == 0
      spf[i] = i
      (i*2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
        if spf[j] == 0
          spf[j] = i
        end
      end
    end
  end

  prime_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
  n = nums.size

    x = nums[j]
    if x == 1
      next
    end
    temp = x

      p = spf[temp]
      primes.add(p)
      while temp % p == 0
        temp /= p
      end
    end
    primes.each do |p|

    end
  end

  visited = Array.new(n, false)
  queue = Queue.new
  queue << [0, 0]
  visited[0] = true

    current, steps = queue.pop
    if current == n-1
      return steps
    end
    for next_index in [current - 1, current + 1]
      if next_index >= 0 && next_index < n && !visited[next_index]

    end

              visited[j] = true
              queue << [j, steps + 1]
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end

end

def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
    max_num = 1_000_000
    spf = Array.new(max_num + 1) { 0 }
    (2..max_num).each do |i|
        if spf[i] == 0
            spf[i] = i
            j = i * 2
            while j <= max_num
                if spf[j] == 0
                    spf[j] = i
                end
                j += i
            end
        end
    end

    prime_to_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
    n = nums.size
    for i in 0..n-1
        x = nums[i]
        if x == 1
            next
        end
        primes = Set.new
        temp = x
        while temp > 1
            p = spf[temp]
            primes.add(p)
            while temp % p == 0
                temp /= p
            end
        end
        for p in primes
            prime_to_indices[p] << i
        end
    end

    visited = Array.new(n, false)
    queue = Queue.new
    queue << [0, 0]
    visited[0] = true
    while !queue.empty?
        current, steps = queue.pop
        if current == n-1
            return steps
        end
        for delta in [-1, 1]
            next_index = current + delta
            if next_index >= 0 && next_index < n && !visited[next_index]
                visited[next_index] = true
                queue << [next_index, steps + 1]
            end
        end
        current_num = nums[current]
        if current_num > 1 && spf[current_num] == current_num
            prime = current_num
            indices = prime_to_indices[prime]
            for j in indices
                if j != current && !visited[j]
                    visited[j] = true
                    queue << [j, steps + 1]
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return -1
end

            primes_map[p] << j

        end

    queue = [0]

    visited[0] = true

                queue << current - 1

            end

            if current + 1 < n and not visited[current + 1]

                visited[current + 1] = true

                queue << current + 1

            end

        end

        steps += 1

    end

    return -1 # should not reach here

end

def get_prime_factors(x: Int64) -> Set(Int64)

    factors = Set.new

    if x == 1

        return factors

    # check for 2

    if x % 2 == 0

        factors.add(2)

        while x % 2 == 0

            x /= 2

        end

    end

    # check odd numbers up to sqrt(x)

            while x % i == 0

                x /= i

            end

        end

        i += 2

    end

    if x > 1

        factors.add(x)

    end

    return factors

end
